message:
fix(output): Add TOON encoding fallback and improve format resolution

- Fix case normalization in acfs_resolve_format() - format string is already
  lowercase from earlier processing, so remove redundant uppercase patterns
- Add fallback to JSON output when tru encoding fails (empty output)
  - Emits warning to stderr to aid debugging
  - Ensures agent always receives valid structured output
- Prevents silent failures when TOON encoder encounters edge cases

This improves robustness of the output formatting layer, ensuring agents
always receive parseable output even when TOON encoding fails unexpectedly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -419,12 +419,20 @@ main() {
         shift
         ;;
       --format|-f)
+        if [[ -z "${2:-}" || "$2" == -* ]]; then
+          echo "Error: --format requires a value (json or toon)" >&2
+          return 1
+        fi
         _CHEATSHEET_OUTPUT_FORMAT="$2"
         json_mode=true
         shift 2
         ;;
       --format=*)
         _CHEATSHEET_OUTPUT_FORMAT="${1#*=}"
+        if [[ -z "$_CHEATSHEET_OUTPUT_FORMAT" ]]; then
+          echo "Error: --format requires a value (json or toon)" >&2
+          return 1
+        fi
         json_mode=true
         shift
         ;;

@@ -2367,12 +2367,20 @@ main() {
                 ;;
             --format|-f)
                 shift
+                if [[ -z "${1:-}" || "$1" == -* ]]; then
+                    echo "Error: --format requires a value (json or toon)" >&2
+                    return 1
+                fi
                 _DOCTOR_OUTPUT_FORMAT="$1"
                 JSON_MODE=true
                 shift
                 ;;
             --format=*)
                 _DOCTOR_OUTPUT_FORMAT="${1#*=}"
+                if [[ -z "$_DOCTOR_OUTPUT_FORMAT" ]]; then
+                    echo "Error: --format requires a value (json or toon)" >&2
+                    return 1
+                fi
                 JSON_MODE=true
                 shift
                 ;;

@@ -677,11 +677,19 @@ info_main() {
                 ;;
             --format|-f)
                 shift
+                if [[ -z "${1:-}" || "$1" == -* ]]; then
+                    echo "Error: --format requires a value (json or toon)" >&2
+                    return 1
+                fi
                 _INFO_OUTPUT_FORMAT="$1"
                 output_mode="json"  # --format implies structured output
                 ;;
             --format=*)
                 _INFO_OUTPUT_FORMAT="${1#*=}"
+                if [[ -z "$_INFO_OUTPUT_FORMAT" ]]; then
+                    echo "Error: --format requires a value (json or toon)" >&2
+                    return 1
+                fi
                 output_mode="json"
                 ;;
             --toon|-t)

@@ -63,12 +63,12 @@ acfs_resolve_format() {
         fmt="json"
     fi
 
-    # Validate and normalize
+    # Validate and normalize (fmt is already lowercase)
     case "$fmt" in
-        toon|TOON)
+        toon)
             echo "toon"
             ;;
-        json|JSON|*)
+        *)
             echo "json"
             ;;
     esac
@@ -97,6 +97,13 @@ acfs_format_output() {
                 local toon_data
                 toon_data=$(printf '%s' "$json_data" | tru --encode 2>/dev/null)
 
+                # If encoding failed (empty output), fall back to JSON
+                if [[ -z "$toon_data" ]]; then
+                    echo "[acfs] Warning: tru encoding failed, falling back to JSON" >&2
+                    printf '%s\n' "$json_data"
+                    return 0
+                fi
+
                 if [[ "$show_stats" == "true" ]]; then
                     local json_bytes toon_bytes savings
                     json_bytes=$(printf '%s' "$json_data" | wc -c)
